title: 🎙️ Cariboo Local Affairs
description: Today is all about the Cariboo-Chilcotin (chil-KOH-tin) region: the decisions, events, and conversations happening in Williams Lake, Quesnel, 100 Mile House, Bella Coola, and the surrounding region. We're covering local government, community life, economic stories, and the digital equity challenges that shape what it means to live and work in rural BC. - Daily themed article selection for podcast generation

_podcast.theme_description: Today is all about the Cariboo-Chilcotin (chil-KOH-tin) region: the decisions, events, and conversations happening in Williams Lake, Quesnel, 100 Mile House, Bella Coola, and the surrounding region. We're covering local government, community life, economic stories, and the digital equity challenges that shape what it means to live and work in rural BC.
_podcast.theme_scoring_prompt: Rate how well this article fits the theme 'Cariboo Voices & Local News' — stories FROM and ABOUT the Cariboo-Chilcotin region and its communities. Score 80-100 for articles directly covering: news and events in Williams Lake, Quesnel, 100 Mile House, Bella Coola, Horsefly, Likely, Anahim Lake, Alexis Creek, or the Cariboo Regional District; local government and civic decisions (City of Williams Lake, City of Quesnel, CRD, District of 100 Mile House); local health services and emergency closures; local economy, businesses, and community programs; Cariboo arts, culture, and community events; AND digital equity, rural internet access (fiber, fixed wireless, Starlink), and connectivity serving these specific communities. Articles from local Cariboo news sources (mycariboonow.com, wltribune.com, quesnelobserver.com, 100milefreepress.net, cfjctoday.com) covering Cariboo community life should score 65-85. Score 50-79 for: BC provincial news directly affecting Cariboo communities, rural Canadian community stories closely paralleling Cariboo life, digital equity and rural internet broadly. Score 20-49 for: general BC news that may affect rural areas, broader rural Canada topics without specific Cariboo tie-in. Score 0-19 for: national/international news without Cariboo relevance, pure tech or entertainment with no community angle. Score 0-100 where 100 is a perfect thematic match.
